response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video to determine the structure: an intro/talk segment followed by a song.
2. Observed on-screen text at 02:14: 'エアーマンが倒せない', '作詞:せら', '作曲:せら'.
3. Identified the song 'Airman ga Taosenai' (エアーマンが倒せない) by Sera, a popular song from the Mega Man/Rockman fandom.
4. Performed a search with the query '"エアーマンが倒せない" "Team.Nekokan" Japanese and English lyrics' to confirm details and retrieve lyrics.
5. Identified the performers as Hakui Koyori and Nekomata Okayu.
6. Constructed the final JSON with the scene breakdown and retrieved lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance titled 'Game Song Live'. It starts with a conversational segment by the VTuber Hakui Koyori. Following this, she and Nekomata Okayu perform a song titled 'Airman ga Taosenai' (エアーマンが倒せない).

scenes.description: The video begins with the VTuber Hakui Koyori introducing her concert 'Game Song Live' and engaging in a conversational segment.
The VTubers Hakui Koyori and Nekomata Okayu perform the song 'Airman ga Taosenai'. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: エアーマンが倒せない (Airman ga Taosenai)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら　同じ面ばかりプレイ
そしていつも　同じ場所で死ぬ
あきらめずに　消える足場に挑戦するけど
すぐに下に落ちるよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I realized it, I was playing the same stage again and again
And I always die in the same spot
I keep trying to jump on the vanishing platforms without giving up
But I immediately fall down
